name: Taste of Provence Veggie S'mich w Grilled Sweet 'Tato Chips
recipeIngredient: 1 large plum tomato, peeled and seeded, diced
1 red bell pepper, seeded and cored, halved
1 yellow bell pepper, seeded and cored, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggplant and zucchini into 1/2-inch strips lengthwise.
2. Sprinkle lightly with salt and let rest in a colander for about half an hour.
3. Rinse well and pat dry.
4. Roast garlic: Remove the outer skin, cut off the top, rub with olive oil, and grill until soft.
5. Squeeze out the soft pulp and mix with olives, tomato, pepper flakes, balsamic vinegar, and herbes de Provence.
6. Mix in 1 tablespoon olive oil to form a paste.
7. Brush veggies lightly with olive oil.
8. Grill 4 to 6 minutes until cooked through but not limp, turning once.
9. Slice the bread and toast on the grill.
10. Assemble the sandwich with lettuce, veggies, and goat cheese. Use the garlic/olive paste as a spread on the roll.
11. Slice peeled sweet potatoes into 1/2-inch thick slices, brush lightly with olive oil, and grill for 7 to 10 minutes, sprinkling with salt.
